0000000101010110011111110 - ASI: 15

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  110 = 11 * 0
  0101 = 01 * 01
  0110 = 0 * 110
  1111 = 11 * 11
  000000 = 000 * 000
  010101 = 01 * 0101
  011001 = 0110 * 01
  1111110 = 1111 * 110
  000000010101 = 000000 * 010101
  0110011111110 = 011001 * 1111110
  0000000101010110011111110 = 000000010101 * 0110011111110
